entry.title: I can't help falling in love with you
entry.summary:
Author: borkbork52

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,685Chapters: 9/15Kudos: 289

Summary: Tim returns home after a Bad Time™ with Bernard thinking he's worthless only to discover just how much his family loves him (and then some) instead. A deep dive into consensual polycule Batfamily where the boys fall in love, seduce their dad, and make Gotham look good doing it.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,342Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 592

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: Domination
entry.summary:
Author: Mariessa

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,209Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 115

Summary: Dick struggles to keep his family together. Too bad life had other plans and he's meeting his maker. --- "I apologize." Dick's voice was far, far away. "I do love you, Jason. I love you like everyone else." "Well, I didn't." --- NOTE 2026: I am actively editing this so every once in a while you may see the word count change. I have cleaned up the tags also so its not as confusing for new readers and will update every few months.

entry.title: catch-22
entry.summary:
Author: mimingemotion

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,998Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: He didn't even remember what he said. The rage that clouded his mind had turned everything positively incandescent, from the shitty almost-broken ceiling light to the ugly green tiles, and then his mouth was open and he was yelling and Dick had taken one good look at him and- and left. Just up and left Jason's apartment like he was off to work, keys clacking and backpack slung over his shoulder casually, wordlessly, like he didn't give enough of a shit to acknowledge that the thing between them had finally cracked open and choked its last breath. Jason hoped he wouldn't come back.

entry.title: I'll fucking digest you (one kiss at a time)
entry.summary:
Author: arakhnoidsilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,445Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 46

Summary: "I didn't know you had this sigil." He commented, his voice still rough from the facefucking."That's because it's a compound of various sigils, mixed into one, bunny." His lingerie was still on, but Jason knew he was itching to take it off. Not to be clothed at all."M-multiple?" Dick's eyes widened as his gaze turned to Jason, whose smirk got meaner, "We agreed only for one!""No, you said I would get to put a sigil on you, and I would let your family go on with their life, as nothing ever truly happened." He snickered as he got up from the bed and then reached for the man, slotting himself right behind him as he looked at the image reflected on the full-view mirror.

entry.title: Heatwave
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,377Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 205

Summary: As Gotham swelters under a relentless summer heatwave, Jason Todd struggles to readjust to life at Wayne Manor, back under Bruce’s rules and back among family. The edges of it are starting to feel familiar again, but something between him and Dick Grayson has shifted, and as hot summer days fade into warm nights, the line between comfort and something deeper begins to blur.

entry.title: aftermath
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 647Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 50

Summary: Dick can’t help but notice his brain is foggy and his body still feels heavy. He’s slumped against the window slightly, barely able to process what just happened. It felt like it all happened quite fast, in an spectacularly explosive way; one moment Dick is drinking his whiskey and then the next Jason’s knocking the daylights out of someone, yelling about roofies and for the guy who tried to lead him out of the club to get the fuck out before he kills him. Jason keeps looking back at him through the rearview and it burns—his gaze burns in an unexplainable way that Dick can’t even being to put into words. He knows Jason means well. He didn’t do anything wrong at all and Dick knows that, but the predicament in of itself made Dick feel so ashamed that he didn’t even want to be perceived.  Jason shouldn’t have had to save him. That entire point kept circling around his head, driving Dick mad.or: day six - jason saves dick from a spiked drink

entry.title: candy shop
entry.summary:
Author: mikaminato

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,210Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 87

Summary: "I guess I like... lollipops," Dick says, the word coming out a little breathier than he intended. Jason's smirk widens. "Is that so? Well, we've got all kinds of lollipops. Big ones, small ones. Swirly ones. Even some that change color as you lick 'em." Dick swallows hard. He's in way over his head. "Maybe," Dick says, his voice barely a whisper. "You could show me?"   (Or, when Batman learns that a neighborhood candy shop may be the latest front for Red Hood's operations, he sends Dick and Damian to investigate. Unfortunately, Dick gets distracted by the shop's ridiculously attractive owner, Jason.)
